# Inurri

> Strony i aplikacje internetowe dopasowane do potrzeb biznesu.

## Summary

Inurri designs and builds fast, maintainable web solutions: business websites, landing pages, web applications, integrations, automation, and cloud-based tooling.

## Technology

- **Astro** for fast content-focused websites
- **React** for interactive interfaces
- **Tailwind CSS** for responsive styling
- **WordPress, Wix, and Webflow** where editable or builder-based solutions fit better
- **AWS, Cloudflare, and Google tools** for hosting, performance, security, analytics, and visibility

## Navigation

- [Strona główna](/pl/) - Main landing page.
- [Realizacje](/pl/portfolio/) - Selected work and case studies.
- [Cennik](/pl/pricing/) - Service pricing.
- [Kontakt](/pl/contact/) - Project inquiry form.
- [Polityka prywatności](/pl/privacy/) - Privacy policy.

## Configuration

Site-wide settings are managed in `src/site.config.ts`. Localized copy is managed in `src/i18n/locales/`.
